title: The Fish-Man District’s Hatred Surfaces
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Jinbe, King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Brook, Narrator, Robin, Zoro. The core story beat is the fish-man district’s hatred surfaces.
scene: The scene centers on the fish-man district’s hatred surfaces, with Jinbe, King Neptune, Unknown person #1, Brook, Narrator, Robin, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: And Jinbe's faction, that irritating offshoot from the sun pirates that always stood in our way, are out of the picture, dosun!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Neptunee. Fukaboshi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryluboshi. Mamboshi.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Muhh!!! If we can just take those four out, the rest of the Neptunee army is nothing to worry about!! Muhhih!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Kya!! Let's tear the flesh from their bones!! Kyakya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you show me what to slice, and I'll slice it... simple as that... *hic*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get this started... you all have your assigned locations, so go and conquer them!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Today marks the end of the Ryuguguuguuguuguuuk Kingdom!! We will be the new rulers of the ocean depths!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah hhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fish bus stop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: destination: The ocean forest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...S... somebody... report...!! she...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BURORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Basun

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as I thought this is valuable information...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: There is a poneglyph in this area...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This country holds an important key...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to the secrets of the blank century...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, don't you go acting like I sliced 'em all up because I wanted to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it is true! You battled with vicarious joy! Any fool could see, you are a born killer!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Whaddaya expect me to do when a bunch of pirates come charging in with swords at the ready?! serve 'em tea?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Y - Yes, tea would be a good start...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then you could talk things over calmly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As though that would've worked with these guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At any rate, with all of them out of action, we have no way of knowing their objective in coming here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And who says I've gotta find out that kinda stuff?! This is YOUR PROBLEM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everything is going so wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Do you think Luffy-san was able to see the mermaid Princess? I would so love to meet her...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Forget all that!!! Release my bonds!!! Return my Shirahoshii to me, you friends!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Look, why would we kidnap the mermaid Princess?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy is the culprit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: certainly, it is true that Luffy-san and the shark came out of that room...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: But I saw no sign of anyone resembling a mermaid Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nevertheless, she would never leave the palace of her own accord!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: And besides, Shirahoshii is as large as I! She could hardly leave without anyone noticing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: EHP! The mermaid Princess is huge?! How outrageous!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I know!! Perhaps the culprit stuffed Shirahoshii inside Megalo's mouth, and took her from the castle that way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PFF FFT!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: This is hardly the time for such silly jokes, your majesty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if somebody were crazy enough to think up such an idea, they would never carry it out!! The very concept is absurd!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...at any rate...! Our captain would never Kidnap anyone!! So cast your suspicions elsewhere, got that?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: No!! There is no other explanation!! If Shirahoshii does not return un- harmed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I will never bring you your ship or your crewmates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No waya a day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryluguu Palace Entrance: All Gates Open

summary: The Fish-Man District’s Hatred Surfaces. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
